index.heading: Overview
index.welcome: Welcome to your personal knowledge center. Configure this page in Administration.

todos.title: Notes & todos
todos.empty: Nothing here yet. Add your first note.

recentActivity.title: Recent activity
recentActivity.empty: No activity yet — it will appear as you explore.

recentPages.title: Recently captured
recentPages.empty: No captured pages yet. Use the companion panel to capture one.

exploreMap.title: Knowledge map
exploreMap.subtitle: Explore the taxonomy in vector space — constellations, semantic neighbours and distant stars.

objects.title: Knowledge objects
objects.name: Title
objects.resourceHint: Where the real asset lives. Available: {{list}}
objects.bodyPlaceholder: Markdown text… [[01.02]] anchors the object to a taxonomy node.
objects.bodyHint: [[node-id]] and [text](ref) links become edges in the explorer.
objects.emptyHint: Knowledge objects are index cards for anything — notes, queries, recipes, tables.

captures.title: Captured page metadata
captures.emptyHint: Entries appear after the companion panel or an nOS agent submits one.

taxonomy.title: Curated taxonomy metadata
taxonomy.name: Name
taxonomy.loadFailed: Could not load data from the server.
taxonomy.requiredDataHint: Deep-links this node into a live nOS service. Available: {{list}}
taxonomy.searchPlaceholder: Filter by id, name or description…

lint.title: Knowledge health
lint.clean: No open findings — the cortex is healthy.

moderation.title: Knowledge moderation
moderation.empty: No proposals — the librarian has nothing pending.

fsMappings.title: Mapped folders
fsMappings.noRoots: No roots are mounted. Roots are configured in nOS (keap_fs_roots) — the app can only map folders inside mounted roots.
fsMappings.label: Label
fsMappings.nestHint: The folder appears inside the central Files core.
fsMappings.standaloneHint: The folder becomes its own constellation on the outer ring.
fsMappings.deleteBody: Removes the mapping and its {{count}} mirrored objects. Files on disk are untouched; embeddings are cleaned up by the nightly sync.
fsMappings.saved: Saved — {{count}} files synced. Visible in Explore now; semantic search picks them up after the next embedding sync.

settings.title: Settings
settings.darkModeHint: Switch between the light and dark theme
settings.exportHint: Download your todos, completed items and captures as a JSON backup.
settings.exportDoneHint: Your data was downloaded as a file.
settings.dbInfoHint: Technical details about the running instance
settings.aboutDescriptionText: KEAP (Knowledge Explorer and Preserver) is a knowledge system for the nOS platform: a curated taxonomy of human knowledge with links into live nOS content services, a capture pipeline for preserving what you find, and an API that serves nOS agents.
aboutFeaturesList: Capture pages via the companion panel
Per-user progress and notes behind nOS SSO
Agent API — nOS agents query and preserve knowledge
Deep links into Kiwix, Calibre-Web, Nextcloud and Open WebUI

extensionPair.title: Connect KEAP extension
extensionPair.return: You can close this page and return to the extension.
extensionPair.invalid: The pairing code is missing or invalid.

scope.context:read: Find related knowledge for the current context
scope.objects:write: Create and edit your knowledge objects
scope.types:write: Create and edit your object types

composeDraft.title: Complete in KEAP
composeDraft.foundation: The secure draft handoff is ready. Type-specific editing and external service connectors follow in the next implementation slice.

camera.shipHint: Mouse: look · WASD: fly · R/F: up/down · Space: boost

panel.title: Constellation
panel.noFocus: Click a node to reveal its semantic neighbourhood.
panel.noVectors: Vectors not synced yet — run keap-embed-sync on the host. The tree works without them.

detail.noDescription: No description yet — the taxonomy-describe skill (or you, via Describe) will fill it.
detail.anchorLocked: Anchor core — the sky’s constants change only by release.
detail.growHintFree: Free zone: an approved proposal materializes immediately (audited).
detail.growHintVotable: Votable core: the proposal goes to the moderator.
detail.childDesc: Description (min 20 chars) — it becomes the node’s search text (load-bearing).
detail.descHint: Descriptions are load-bearing: English is the canonical search/embedding text, Czech is the UI localization.
detail.growApproved: Node {{id}} materialized — the star is in the universe.

core.tooltip: Move files into the ring center as a 3D core
core.topicSoon: Topic clustering outside the taxonomy — coming soon

tables.title: Data tables
tables.name: Title
tables.emptyHint: Create the first one — a SharePoint-style list with selectable storage.
tables.noRows: No rows — add the first one in the form above.
tables.badJson: Invalid JSON in a complex column.

libsql.name: KEAP SQL (libSQL)
libsql.pitch: Transactions and instant events — every change flows straight into activity, lint and search. The default for living lists.

rustfs.name: RustFS (S3)
rustfs.pitch: Native object versioning and lifecycle routines of the object store. Row history for free; the road to parquet/OLAP cubes.

postgres.name: PostgreSQL
postgres.pitch: Database triggers and routines, shared with other services.

grist.name: Grist
grist.pitch: A full spreadsheet editor as a service.

visibilityHint.private: Only you and administrators can see this table.
visibilityHint.tier-users: Visible to users, managers and administrators.
visibilityHint.tier-guests: Visible to everyone with an access tier, including guests.
visibilityHint.shared: Readable by every signed-in user in this tenant.
